meta.title: Free Percentage Calculator | Fast & Accurate Percent Math
meta.description: Easily calculate percentages online. Find percent of a number, convert to percent, and calculate increases or decreases.

seo.intro: Use our free percentage calculator to solve common percent problems quickly and accurately.
seo.content: This percentage calculator helps you compute percentage values, percentage change, increases and decreases. It works instantly and is optimized for speed and accuracy.

faq.question: How do you calculate percentage?
faq.answer: Divide the value by the total and multiply by 100.

faq.question: How to calculate percentage increase?
faq.answer: Subtract old value from new value, divide by old value and multiply by 100.
